assertions_covered: (13d) every non-embedder-api workspace crate uses version.workspace = true
regression_novelty: Test #13 exercises the scenario where both axes start at 0.6.0 before the bump. Tests 2 and 12 cannot catch accidental axis-E mutation in this case because they either use a fixed distinct axis-E value (12: pre-set to 2.2.2) or don't check the workspace.dependencies pin explicitly (2). A future change that drops the embedder-api guard in set_workspace_dep_axis_w_versions() would bump the pin from 0.6.0 to 0.6.1 — caught only by this test.
script_status: UNCHANGED — design verification (2026-05-22) confirmed correct; all 23 tests GREEN on first run
